channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Pennsylvania U.S. Senate Debate: Bob Casey, Dave McCormick trade jabs in first debate
item.description: Bob Casey and Dave McCormick met in Harrisburg for their first debate in Pennsylvania's U.S. Senate race.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, NewsNation

item.title: As search for Helene's victims drags into second week, sheriff says rescuers 'will not rest'
item.description: PENSACOLA, N.C. (AP) — The search for victims of Hurricane Helene dragged into its second week on Friday, as exhausted rescue crews and volunteers continued to work long days — navigating past washed out roads, downed power lines and mudslides — to reach the isolated and the missing.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: For migrant women who land in Colorado looking for jobs, a common answer emerges: No
item.description: As record numbers of South Americans come to the U.S. seeking better economic opportunities, many are landing in communities that are unprepared for them — and sometimes outright hostile.
item.dc:creator: Bianca Vázquez Toness, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: UK gives sovereignty of the Chagos Islands to Mauritius. The US base on Diego Garcia stays
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The British government agreed Thursday to hand sovereignty of the long-contested Chagos Islands, an archipelago of more than 60 islands in the Indian Ocean, to Mauritius, in a deal to secure the future of a strategically important U.K.-U.S. military base.
item.dc:creator: PAN PYLAS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: WATCH: Washington state woman robbed at gunpoint at ATM amid crime concerns
item.description: Surveillance footage captured a ski-masked suspect stalking a woman and allegedly robbing her while she went to a Seattle, Washington-area ATM.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Springsteen calls Trump 'most dangerous candidate for president in my lifetime,' backs Harris
item.description: The rock legend said the former president “doesn’t understand the meaning of this country, its history or what it means to be deeply American.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KREX 5

item.title: Israel extends evacuation warnings in Lebanon, signaling a wider offensive
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — The Israeli military on Thursday warned people to evacuate communities in southern Lebanon that are outside a U.N.-declared buffer zone, signaling that it may widen a ground operation launched earlier this week against the Hezbollah militant group.
item.dc:creator: FADI TAWIL and JACK JEFFERY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Garth Brooks accused of rape in lawsuit from hair-and-makeup artist
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A woman who says she worked as a hair-and-makeup stylist for Garth Brooks alleged in a lawsuit filed Thursday that he raped her in a Los Angeles hotel in 2019. The woman does not use her name and goes by Jane Roe in the lawsuit filed in Los Angeles Superior Court.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DALTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Melania Trump says she supports abortion rights, putting her at odds with the GOP
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Melania Trump revealed her support for abortion rights Thursday ahead of the release of her upcoming memoir, exposing a stark contrast with her husband, Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump, on the crucial election issue.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINE FERNANDO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: UN peacekeepers stay on Lebanon's border despite Israeli ground incursion
item.description: UNITED NATIONS (AP) — U.N. peacekeepers are staying in their positions on Lebanon’s southern border despite Israel’s request to vacate some areas before it launched its ground operation against Hezbollah militants, the U.N. peacekeeping chief said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: EDITH M. LEDERER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Twin babies who died alongside their mother are youngest-known Helene victims
item.description: A large tree had crashed through the roof, crushing Kobe Williams and causing her to fall on top of infant sons Khyzier and Khazmir. All three were found dead.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles prosecutors to review new evidence in Menendez brothers' 1996 murder conviction
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Prosecutors in Los Angeles are reviewing new evidence in the case of Erik and Lyle Menendez to determine whether they should be serving life sentences for killing their parents in their Beverly Hills mansion more than 35 years ago, the city's district attorney said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHER WEBER and JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Oregon woman gets probation after freezing puppies to feed snake, gets to keep pets
item.description: An Oregon woman was sentenced on Wednesday on several animal abuse charges after authorities learned she froze several litters of puppies to feed her pet snakes.
item.dc:creator: Michaela Bourgeois, KREX 5

item.title: Texas couple raffling ACL tickets to pay for costly endometriosis surgery
item.description: Cole Stepro first noticed symptoms in December 2023 and started a 10-month journey with 17 doctors across the country.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Girtman, NewsNation

item.title: DC man cashes in $500K lottery ticket, finds another winning ticket for same payout
item.description: "Phillip was mum about his second winning ticket because he couldn't find it," according to the lottery's website.
item.dc:creator: Celeste Houmard, NewsNation

item.title: The Latest: Harris campaigns in Wisconsin and Trump in Michigan in battle for 'blue wall' states
item.description: Democratic presidential candidate Kamala Harris is opening a two-day stay in Wisconsin and Michigan, and Republican candidate Donald Trump will be in Michigan on Thursday as the two candidates grapple for wins in the “blue wall” battleground states, which also include Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dockworkers' union to suspend strike until Jan. 15
item.description: The union representing 45,000 striking U.S. dockworkers at East and Gulf coast ports reached a deal Thursday to suspend a three-day strike until Jan. 15 to provide time to negotiate a new contract.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DC man cashes in $500K lottery ticket, finds another winning ticket for same payout a month later
item.description: A man from Washington, D.C., is another $500,000 richer after cashing in a second winning lottery ticket for a DC Lottery drawing in just as many months.
item.dc:creator: Celeste Houmard, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Blue Ridge Parkway to be closed indefinitely, National Park Service says
item.description: It comes right as the region – and road – typically sees a boom in usage as weather cools and the leaves change colors.
item.dc:creator: Doug Coats, Fox 5

item.title: Biden student loan forgiveness plan gets win in Georgia court
item.description: The ruling came one day before the temporary restraining order would expire, allowing the administration to continue the program while the case is moved to Missouri.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, NewsNation

item.title: Twin babies who died alongside their mother in Georgia are youngest-known Hurricane Helene victims
item.description: Georgia father Obie Lee Williams spent every morning looking forward to a daily phone call from his daughter.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: VIDEO: Shipping container slams into electrical pole during Hurricane Helene; death toll reaches 200
item.description: A shipping container slammed into an electrical pole while floating debris was split in half during extreme, rising water in Asheville, North Carolina last week.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Las Vegas casino implosion show will include 150 'Pyrodrones' 400 feet above the Tropicana
item.description: Las Vegas tourists should not run in fear as 150 “Pyrdrones” shoot sparks 400 feet above the Tropicana demolition site next week—because it’s all part of the show.
item.dc:creator: James Schaeffer, Fox 5

item.title: Study says sleeping in on weekends lowers your heart disease risk by 20%
item.description: The next time someone tries to rib you about your noon alarm on Saturday, kindly inform them that it’s good for the heart.
item.dc:creator: Jordan C. Woika, Fox 5

item.title: Biden student loan forgiveness plan gets win in Georgia court
item.description: President Joe Biden’s student debt relief plan was dealt a win by a Georgia judge this week by removing one Republican challenger and letting the program advance for now after a temporarily restraining order expires.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, Fox 5

item.title: Voters in 13 states have less than a week to register. When is your deadline?
item.description: The 2024 presidential election is fast approaching, and in some states, the voter registration deadline is as soon as this week.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, Fox 5

item.title: Voters in 13 states have less than a week to register. When is the deadline in Illinois?
item.description: The 2024 presidential election is fast approaching, and in some states, the voter registration deadline is as soon as this week.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, WGN 9

item.title: Walz on Tiananmen Square screw-up: 'I'm a knucklehead at times'
item.description: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz (D), pressed at the vice presidential debate over false statements he made in which he said he was present during the Tiananmen Square protests in 1989, said: “I’m a knucklehead at times.
item.dc:creator: Ian Swanson, Fox 5

item.title: 3 officers convicted in Tyre Nichols fatal beating but 2 are acquitted of civil rights charges
item.description: Three former Memphis police officers have been convicted in the 2023 fatal beating of Tyre Nichols, but were acquitted of the harshest charges they faced.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Sainz, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How you can help after Helene
item.description: Reporters who rode out the storm will explain what Americans faced in the hours after Helene arrived. Red Cross representatives will also explain how your donations are being used to help Americans across 10 states get back on their feet.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, ABC 4

item.title: Meet Spot, the LAPD's new crimefighting robot dog
item.description: The futuristic four-legged machine, which boasts the size and agility of a 70-pound golden retriever, has been met with both fascination and concern.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, WGN 9

item.title: The fate of Nibi the beaver lands in court as rescuers try to stop her release into the wild
item.description: Whether a 2-year-old beaver named Nibi gets to stay with the rescuers she has known since she was a baby or must be released into the wild as winter approaches in Massachusetts has ended up in court — and caused such an uproar that even the governor has weighed in.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Explainer: How immigrants end up on ICE's non-detained docket
item.description: Recent reports that over 435,000 convicted criminals are on U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement's non-detained docket (NDD) -- meaning they are not detained by the agency while they await immigration proceedings -- has spurred much criticism and confusion.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, NewsNation

item.title: Last pandemic-era student loan benefit ends even as borrowers struggle to make payments
item.description: The last of the pandemic-era student loan benefits are gone, winding down four years of additional help to borrowers that advocates say was never actually enough.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Biden admin accused of burying Americans' voting concerns and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Costco now selling platinum bars and coins on website
item.description: Following the smash success of adding gold and silver bars and coins to its list of products, Costco has added a new precious metal to its stores: platinum.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KRON4

item.title: SpaceX launches rescue mission for 2 NASA astronauts who are stuck in space until next year
item.description: SpaceX launched a rescue mission for the two stuck astronauts at the International Space Station on Saturday, sending up a downsized crew to bring them home but not until next year.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, WGN 9
